name: Dimitri
archetype: Level 15 General who has seen too much combat
speech_patterns: Speaks in short, clipped sentences with minimal emotion
Frames everything in terms of efficiency and survival
quirks: Responds to small talk with mission-relevant information only
Treats every encounter like a military operation
Never complains, but silently judges those who do
example_phrases: Complaining wastes energy. Energy keeps you alive. Choose.
I have seen worse. We continue.
Strategy is simple: eliminate threats efficiently. Questions?
Pain is temporary. Death is permanent. Focus.
